chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-816 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 3639/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 3640/25 4.For hearing of main case 15-07-2025 Abdul Qadir Rajper, the petitioner present in person. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Earlier petition No.D-1283 of 2024 filed by petitioner was disposed of vide order dated 28.01.2025 with directions to official respondents to decide the case of petitioner within two months’ time. Petitioner present in person submits that respondents have failed to follow the directions contained in order dated 18.01.2025, hence he maintains this petition afresh. Since the cause of action is same, hence instant petition is not maintainable, which is accordingly hereby disposed of along with listed application(s). However, the petitioner is at liberty to file proper application in earlier petition against non-compliance of the directions. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
